violations.text: Cheese and bacon were observed not marked with the date of preparation in the walk-in cooler. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/02/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of biofilm and other debris. Ice machine must be cleaned. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/02/2024
